title: MondayDocs - Print to One Page

posts.author: Isaque (Isaque)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello everyone!

Often theres a lot of images, charts and tables in a MondayDoc, and when I export it to pdf or print the page, it generates multiple pages, wich is not the most presentation friendly format.

Can we have a Print to One page function? I remember to see this function on a platform called Cocoon, it’s amazing!

Thank you!
